form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing third behind Lougle at this track over 2200m in a NR 60 to 69 on March 22 at $6.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second behind Shes Allaboutluv at Hobart over 2090m in a 3yo+ NMT 4 LTW's on April 3 at $1.65. Rates highly and expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: 4th (Fr2) over 2090m after showing early pace at Hobart, beaten 8 m by Shes Allaboutluv (2:36.20) in 3yo+ NMT 4 LTW's on April 3 at $15. form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track. Last start won by 3.5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (2:46.30) beating Barber Shop in 3yo+, NMT 2 LTW's CGH on April 4 at $1.24. Leading contender on recent form.
